reason: could not rewrite to behavioral tests while preserving oracle: nop=1 (tests pass on base code) after rewrite. The bug is referential stability (functions recreated unnecessarily), not correctness. Base code compiles and passes all functional tests; stability cannot be verified without a React rendering environment. Original source-grep tests preserve oracle (nop=0, gold=1) but were flagged for being text-based. No behavioral equivalent exists that discriminates base from fix.
